concerns: SignalSnapshot is nested (locale/device/rendering sub-objects), but the plan describes signal extraction as if fields are top-level. Step 2 must reference the actual access paths (e.g. snapshot.rendering.renderer, snapshot.locale.languages, snapshot.device.screenWidth) to avoid compile errors.

touchSupport is typed as boolean | string and webglSupported as boolean — the plan should note that boolean sentinels need different handling than string 'unknown'/'unavailable' checks (e.g. touchSupport could be false legitimately, not just as a missing sentinel).
